name: medical-skills
description: Medical agent skills for clinical guideline parsing, clinical logic trees, and entity inventories.

interface.shortDescription: Clinical guideline parsing and medical entity skills.
interface.longDescription: Medical Skills bundles agent skills for turning medical source material into reusable clinical logic, entity inventories, and downstream extraction or configuration assets.
defaultPrompt: Use medical-guideline-parser-v2 to structure this guideline.
Build a clinical logic tree and entity inventory from this guideline.
Check this parser output with the bundled QA script.
